title: Casque d'Or
writer: Jacques Becker, Jacques Companéez, Annette Wademant
actors: Simone Signoret, Serge Reggiani, Claude Dauphin
plot: Three gangsters and an ex-con carpenter all fall for the same beautiful golden-haired woman in Belle Époque France.
awards: Won 1 BAFTA Award2 wins & 2 nominations total
